docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUO, YAOYAO
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD WITH ZOOM REQUEST FROM PLANTIFF
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,488.86 [RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL WRIT] AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BORAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO JAN-28TH HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUO, YAOYAO AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BORAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,339.00 FILED BY GUO, YAOYAO AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BORAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUO, YAOYAO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUO, YAOYAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, BORAN $2,339.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,489.00, THE COURT FINDS VENUE IS PROPER. THE BALANCE OF THE LOAN IS DUE TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED DEC-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BORAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YAOYAO GUO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. DEFENDANT BORAN LI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $60.52 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BORAN
